headline: SGN Announces BlockchAIn Has Established a Collaboration with Supermicro for AI Data Center Hardware
summary: Supermicro's AI-optimized compute platforms supports BlockchAIn's U.S. data center development pipelineSCOTTSDALE, AZ, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Signing Day Sports, Inc. (“Signing Day Sports”, “SGN” or the “Company”) (NYSE American: SGN), in connection with the Company’s previously announced proposed business combination with One Blockchain LLC (“BlockchAIn LLC”), today announced that BlockchAIn LLC is collaborating with Super Micro Computer, Inc. (“Supermicro”) (NASDAQ: SMCI), a public
